Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long LINC is the clear standout leader today with a rank-1 score of 95.5, driven by extraordinary long-term returns: 1,289.71% over 10 years and 481.54% over 5 years, dramatically outpacing SPY by 1,067.73% and 416.85% respectively over those same periods. The stock passes all technical momentum thresholds (all SMA indicators true, 4 of 5 ratio passes, clean momentum signal, confirmed volatility) and shows a "strong_buy" flag, indicating sustained acceleration across timeframes with the 1-year return (143.09%) bridging its 6-month (76.14%) and 5-year (481.54%) performance. CF ranks second with a more moderate profile: 65.97% 1-year return and solid momentum (3 ratio passes, all SMA true), but its 10-year return of 260.3% lags significantly versus SPY (+38.33% relative performance vs SPY's longer-term outperformance), suggesting LINC's momentum is genuinely exceptional rather than sector-wide. The data reveals a market where extreme long-term outperformers like LINC are rare, with most candidates showing much tighter relative performance spreads against
